title: Hungry Case Study: 2x MRR, 3x Engagement, 2x Meetings
full_text: Hungry Case Study: 2x MRR, 3x Engagement, 2x Meetings # How Hungry Used Nooks AI Agents to Triple Prospect Engagement and Double MRR per Rep 100% increase in net new monthly recurring revenue (MRR) Increase in weekly meetings booked per rep Before Nooks, Hungry's outbound motion was fundamentally broken by a fragmented, outdated tech stack. The mandate for SDRs was to make 70 calls a day, but the execution was a logistical nightmare. The team was dialing directly out of their CRM using their own phone numbers, which were constantly being flagged as spam. Legitimate outreach was silenced, resulting in a low pickup rate. Because the stack was so disconnected, sales leadership had zero visibility. The team simply didn't have the 10 hours a week required to manually hunt down call recordings in the CRM to figure out why his reps were failing. The team was flying blind, burning through accounts, and maxing out at just two to three booked meetings a week per rep. Hungry realized they couldn't fix their pipeline by simply buying another standalone dialer or email sequencer. They needed to rethink their entire outbound architecture. They chose the Nooks Agent Workspace to unify their dialing, sequencing, and account research into a single, AI-powered platform. The rollout was immediate. By leveraging Smart Presence and other AI calling features, Hungry instantly solved their spam issues, nearly tripling their live pickup rate to 14%. But the true transformation happened when reps began leaning on Nooks' native AI Agents to automate their multi-channel sequences. moved to a Once accounts are identified, the Nooks AI Assistant takes over the tedious work of sequence personalization. The Hungry team actually gave their AI Assistant the profile and persona of a Hungry employee. Joe adds: "It doesn't take me 45 minutes to write a custom email anymore. It takes me four clicks... our targeted AI outreach is hitting open rates in the 40s." Because dialing and sequencing live in the exact same workspace, the context flows perfectly between channels. If an SDR logs a live call, Nooks instantly drafts an AI follow-up email tailored exactly to that specific conversation. | Before Nooks | After Nooks | | --- | --- | | Sequencing Workflow | 4 Disparate Systems | 1 Unified Agent Workspace | | List Building | 10 hrs/week manual searching | Prompt-based AI list building via Signals | | Call Volume | 70 dials took "all day" | 70 dials take < 20 minutes | | Email Drafting | 45 minutes per custom email | 4 clicks using AI Account Assistant | | Live Pickup Rate | 5% (Spam flags) | 14% (Smart Presence) | Thanks to Hungry’s leadership and by letting the Nooks Agent Workspace handle the data synthesis, account research, sequencing, and dialing, Hungry's SDRs were finally able to focus entirely on human conversations and creative strategy. The business impact was profound. Meeting volume doubled across the board, and the quality of the opportunities significantly improved. "We doubled our net new monthly recurring revenue with Nooks," says Joe. "It wasn't necessarily just the number of opportunities; it was the quality of opportunities that we were able to get into that we were never able to before because we had the data." ✓ 100% Increase in MRR: Doubled net new monthly recurring revenue. ✓ Double the Email Responses: Deeply personalized, signal-driven AI emails drove 2x the reply rates and open rates in the 40s. ✓ 2x Meetings Booked: Doubled weekly meeting output per rep. ✓ Hyper-Accelerated Output: SDRs can now execute 70 dials in under 20 minutes, vastly expanding their total sequence reach. ✓ 50% Faster Ramp Time: Reduced time-to-quota from 4 months to 2 months. By unifying their outbound motion, Hungry didn't just fix an outbound problem—they built a highly efficient, multi-channel revenue engine that scales. / score=74.333 / query=AI sales agent ARR customers / intent=find_customer_case / path=industry_landing
